problem id: 77602e0f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND NOT SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  01101100 -> 10111101
  01010110 -> 01011010
  11011110 -> 11011011
  00010001 -> 11001110
  01010000 -> 11111010
  01001100 -> 10111011
  10111101 -> 10010111
  00110011 -> 10101110
  11101100 -> 10111101
  00000110 -> 01011111

query: 00100001
predicted answer: 11001101
